summary: WPF-specific ReactiveUI guidance including view activation, dispatcher scheduling, and XAML binding lifetimes.
recommendedPatterns: Use WhenActivated inside ReactiveWindow<TViewModel> or ReactiveUserControl<TViewModel>.
Use DisposeWith for every binding and subscription created in a view.
Keep IViewFor<T> wiring aligned with WPF dependency property conventions.
avoidPatterns: Do not bind in constructors without activation.
Do not assume background observable callbacks are on the dispatcher thread.
setupSteps: Initialize the WPF platform integration during app startup.
Use reactive base view types where possible.
commonPitfalls: Scheduler issues when updating dependency properties off the UI thread.

sources.title: ReactiveUI WPF code and docs
sources.notes: WPF builder extensions and handbook guidance.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
